name: scribd-dl
description: Scribd Document Downloader based on ray.yukawai's script

scripts.lint: oxlint packages/engine/engine.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix packages/engine/engine.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json packages/engine/engine.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json packages/engine/engine.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
